{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":276167,"duration_api_ms":238054,"num_turns":28,"result":"Step 2 완료. 변경 사항 요약:

- **`ThemeSelector.tsx`**: `!isLoggedIn`이면 `ToggleTabs` 대신 "로그인하면 테마를 저장할 수 있어요." + 로그인 링크를 렌더. 비회원의 `updatePreferences` 호출 경로도 제거(ADR-027 적용).
- **`ThemeSelector.test.tsx`**: 기존 비회원 탭 테스트를 `isLoggedIn={true}`로 수정하고, spec의 3개 신규 테스트 추가. 총 9개 통과.
- **`settings-page.test.tsx`**: 비회원 페이지에 로그인 링크가 2개(계정 섹션 + 테마 섹션)로 늘어 `getByRole` → `getAllByRole`으로 수정.","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"073003d4-80e8-4082-9206-238dae8f3a7e","total_cost_usd":1.2567762,"usage":{"input_tokens":27,"cache_creation_input_tokens":91466,"cache_read_input_tokens":2399209,"output_tokens":12929,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":91466,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":308,"cache_read_input_tokens":103178,"cache_creation_input_tokens":176,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":176},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-sonnet-4-6":{"inputTokens":27,"outputTokens":12929,"cacheReadInputTokens":2399209,"cacheCreationInputTokens":91466,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":1.2567762,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000}},"permission_denials":[],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"18534723-f038-4f45-affb-414c815c2e05"}
